title: Sonic the Hedgehog 2
platform_style_description: Genesis aesthetic, bold contrast, arcade energy, harder shadows, and punchy action framing
main_subject: a small speed-focused runner silhouette leaning forward
environment: a bright sloped coastal course with palm silhouettes, layered cliffs, and one dramatic downhill curve
action_mood_cue: accelerating hard down the slope with the background streaking behind
composition: single runner only, one dominant slope, low horizon, speed lines, and no crowd or extra props
memory_hook: slope-driven speed, coastal energy, and forward momentum you can read instantly
legal_watchouts: avoid official shoe or quill shapes
legal_notes: Risk level: high. Use generic archetypes, avoid franchise-identifiable costume or symbol language, and preserve recognizability through atmosphere, scene memory, and gameplay cues only.
prompt:
Original illustration inspired by a retro Platformer game.

A small speed-focused runner silhouette leaning forward in a bright sloped coastal course with palm silhouettes, layered cliffs, and one dramatic downhill curve, accelerating hard down the slope with the background streaking behind.

Visual focus:
- one clear subject
- strong silhouette
- readable in 1 second
- exactly one primary focal subject
- no crowd, no collage, no multi-character scene

Style:
- Genesis aesthetic, bold contrast, arcade energy, harder shadows, and punchy action framing
- pixel art or stylized rendering depending on platform
- clean and modern interpretation of retro limitations
- limited color palette when relevant

Mood:
- fast, bright, electric

Composition:
- single runner only, one dominant slope, low horizon, speed lines, and no crowd or extra props
- simple background
- no clutter

Important:
- Do NOT replicate any official character, logo, or design
- Do NOT imitate exact game assets
- Must feel original but clearly inspired by the game's genre and atmosphere

Output:
- high clarity
- strong contrast
- minimal noise
- no text
- no watermark
negative_prompt: no official character likeness, no logo, no box art recreation, no screenshot recreation, no UI elements, no sprite rip, no direct copy of official costume or weapon design, no franchise text, no watermark, avoid Sonic likeness, avoid ring iconography, avoid checkerboard terrain patterns, avoid official shoe or quill shapes, avoid resemblance to sonic

generation_notes.preferred_render_mode: illustrative pixel art or stylized retro render
generation_notes.detail_policy: rich enough to feel desirable, simple enough to read fast
